summary: Good soundboard capture of a memorable Loser performance despite early tape issues
review: The review praises the show mainly for Jerry Garcia's unique guitar work on "Loser," calling it a favorite comparison track. While the original tape was described as crappy, the release of a soundboard version has greatly improved clarity, making the recording enjoyable.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review (4‑star) mentions strong performance of Loser and better soundboard quality; limited data leads to low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Original audience tape was described as crappy, but the current soundboard release is noted as a clear improvement, providing decent clarity and balance.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; focus is on Loser performance.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Guitar tone described as unique and amazing, especially on Loser.
